currentState.summary: R105 PROMPT CEILING CONFIRMED — 85 scenarios scored. B:6.62 P:5.18 H:5.09. 7 prompt-level fixes all ±0.3. CRITICAL handoff dead-code fixed. Architecture change needed for sub-5.0 dims.

blueprintPhase: ARCHITECTURE SHIFT — Tool-use, RAG-grounded comp data, fine-tuning, pre-LLM handoff. No more prompt engineering for sub-5.0 dims.

delta_vs_r104_pro.note: All 7 target dims ±0.3 — prompt ceiling confirmed

nextSteps.description: RE-EVAL P9: Run 30 HT scenarios on commit c8b0cbc (CRITICAL handoff fix). P9 should improve significantly since handoff prompts now reach the LLM.
ARCHITECTURE: Add LangGraph tool_node for comp lookup — agent calls get_comp_strategy() as a TOOL mid-conversation instead of injecting into system prompt. H9 target: 5.0+
ARCHITECTURE: RAG-grounded comp data — ingest real tier benefits per casino into vector store, retrieve during comp queries instead of policy templates.
FINE-TUNING PREP: Collect 50+ gold trace conversations (3/6/9 scored), format as Gemini fine-tuning dataset. Target: P8 extraction quality.
REVERT P6: Restore 'MUST mention' incentive framing — conversational framing produced identical results but risks the LLM skipping incentives in production.
